message:
refactor: Complete builtins.zig split into 10 specialized submodules

Main builtins.zig now purely re-exports from submodules (123 lines):
- builtins/pow.zig: PyPowResult, pyPow (111 lines)
- builtins/repr.zig: PyBytes, bytesRepr, stringRepr, etc (394 lines)
- builtins/iterators.zig: range, enumerate, zip, iter, next (326 lines)
- builtins/aggregates.zig: all, any, sum, min, max, sorted (277 lines)
- builtins/conversion.zig: hex, oct, bin, intWithBase, round (208 lines)
- builtins/io.zig: print, input, breakpoint (106 lines)
- builtins/introspection.zig: callable, len, id, hash (119 lines)
- builtins/operators.zig: operatorEq/Ne/Lt/Le/Gt/Ge, pyEqual (262 lines)
- builtins/types.zig: str, bytes, bytearray, memoryview, bigint (117 lines)
- builtins/constructors.zig: list, tuple, set, frozenset, deque (96 lines)

Total: 2139 lines (was 3018, ~29% reduction)
